item.title: Jack & Jones Jjiglenn Jjoriginal Mf 070 Noos Jnr Jeans Niños Azul Oscuro 152
item.description: En este momento está Jack & Jones Jjiglenn Jjoriginal Mf 070 Noos Jnr Jeans Niños Azul Oscuro 152 en el siguiente enlace! 🔎: [MATERIAL]: The Jack & Jones Boys Denim Jeans Is Made of 79% Cotton,19% Polyester & 2% Elastane, Making It Stretchy and Comfortable to Wear [FASTENING]: The Pants Fastens with Button, Making It Easy to Put on and Take Off [FITTING]: This Denim Jeans Has a Slim Fit, Making It Flattering and Stylish [WASHABLE]: The Denim Jeans Is Machine Washable, Making It Easy to Care For [FEATURES]: The Jeans Comes With Adjustable Waist and Has Five Pockets, Making It Versatile and Practical 🛒 Aquí!
